scripts.build:artifact: pnpm --filter '@codor/cli...' build && pnpm --filter @codor/web-next build && pnpm --filter @codor/cli build:artifact
scripts.release:check: pnpm test:all && pnpm audit:license && pnpm audit:release && scripts/fresh-install-test.sh && scripts/packed-install-test.sh
scripts.test:all: pnpm -r build && pnpm -r test && pnpm --filter @codor/web-next e2e
